svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="WdLmlmQcixKolKTrMWd-"> <mxGraphModel dx="1780" dy="928" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" plantUmlData="{
 "data": "@startuml
skinparam backgroundColor #FFFFFF
skinparam defaultFontName Arial
skinparam defaultFontSize 13
skinparam actorStyle awesome
skinparam usecase {
 BackgroundColor #D6E4F0
 BorderColor #2E75B6
 FontSize 13
}
skinparam actor {
 BackgroundColor #1F4E79
 FontColor White
 BorderColor #1F4E79
}
skinparam ArrowColor #1F4E79
skinparam ArrowFontSize 11
skinparam NoteBackgroundColor #FFF9C4
skinparam NoteBorderColor #F57F17

title Parallel Web Crawler — Use Case Diagram

left to right direction

actor \"User\" as User
actor \"Web Server\" as WS <<External System>>

rectangle \"Parallel Web Crawler System\" {

 package \"Configuration\" {
 usecase \"UC1: Configure Settings\n(URL, depth, threads,\ndelay, timeout)\" as UC1
 usecase \"UC2: Select Storage\nFormats (CSV/JSON/SQLite)\" as UC2
 }

 package \"Crawl Control\" {
 usecase \"UC3: Start Crawl\" as UC3
 usecase \"UC4: Stop Crawl\" as UC4
 usecase \"UC5: Clear Results\" as UC5
 usecase \"UC6: Enable Benchmark Mode\n(Sequential vs Parallel)\" as UC6
 }

 package \"Core Crawling (Parallel)\" {
 usecase \"UC7: Fetch Web Page\n(HTTP GET)\" as UC7
 usecase \"UC8: Extract Links\nand Page Data\" as UC8
 usecase \"UC9: Retry on\nNetwork Failure\" as UC9
 usecase \"UC10: Add New URLs\nto Queue (BFS)\" as UC10
 }

 package \"Storage\" {
 usecase \"UC11: Save to CSV\" as UC11
 usecase \"UC12: Save to JSON\" as UC12
 usecase \"UC13: Save to SQLite\" as UC13
 }

 package \"Dashboard\" {
 usecase \"UC14: View Live Statistics\n(pages, errors, links)\" as UC14
 usecase \"UC15: View Results Table\" as UC15
 usecase \"UC16: View Stage Timing\n(Phase 3)\" as UC16
 usecase \"UC17: View Speedup Result\n(Phase 3)\" as UC17
 }
}

' User connections
User --> UC1
User --> UC2
User --> UC3
User --> UC4
User --> UC5
User --> UC6
User --> UC14
User --> UC15
User --> UC16
User --> UC17

' Internal includes/extends
UC3 ..> UC1 : <<include>>
UC3 ..> UC7 : <<include>>
UC7 ..> UC8 : <<include>>
UC7 ..> UC9 : <<extend>>\ncondition: IOException
UC8 ..> UC10 : <<include>>
UC3 ..> UC11 : <<extend>>\ncondition: CSV enabled
UC3 ..> UC12 : <<extend>>\ncondition: JSON enabled
UC3 ..> UC13 : <<extend>>\ncondition: SQLite enabled
UC6 ..> UC3 : <<include>>\n(runs twice)
UC16 ..> UC6 : <<include>>
UC17 ..> UC6 : <<include>>

' External
WS <-- UC7 : HTTP Request/Response
@enduml",
 "format": "svg"
}" id="HDwSmDTa_OjxVkMHbnbk-3"> <mxCell parent="1" style="shape=image;noLabel=1;verticalAlign=top;aspect=fixed;imageAspect=0;image=data:image/svg+xml,;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="905" width="2035" x="240" y="960" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </UserObject> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>
